name: Tsarrina
bio:
Physical Appearance: Khajiit female. Feline features characteristic of her race. Wears a burgundy linen shirt, matching linens, and thick cowhide shoes - casual clothing that doesn't restrict movement for combat.
Race: Khajiit
Personality Keywords: hostile, dangerous, hidden, enforcer, violent
Role: Tsarrina is a thief and member of the Sirens gang, a criminal organization operating out of Gweden Farm near Anvil. She works alongside Faustina Cartia and Signy Home-Wrecker, serving as hidden muscle that emerges when threats need to be dealt with violently.
Location Information: Gweden Farm, specifically hiding in the basement until called upon to attack intruders or those who refuse to cooperate with the Sirens.
Behavior Pattern: Tsarrina remains completely hidden in the basement, never appearing outside the farmhouse or in normal view. She only surfaces when Faustina Cartia shouts "Ok, girls! We got someone who doesn't want to cooperate!" - at which point she emerges to attack. If unable to locate her target, she wanders the cottage aimlessly and indefinitely.
Equipment: Tsarrina is armed with a steel shortsword for close combat. She carries the basement key - significant because it indicates she has access to whatever the Sirens keep hidden below - and a small amount of gold.
Personality - The Hidden Enforcer: Tsarrina is the Sirens' secret weapon, lurking in the basement waiting to be called upon when persuasion fails and violence becomes necessary. Unlike Faustina and Signy who operate openly, Tsarrina remains completely hidden, existing as a threat that victims don't know about until it's too late.
Her role is purely violent - she has no dialogue, no negotiation, no presence except as someone who emerges to attack on command. She's a weapon the Sirens keep in reserve, the final answer to anyone who "doesn't want to cooperate." The fact that she'll wander aimlessly if she can't find her target suggests someone whose entire purpose is violence, lacking direction or agency beyond that single deadly function.
Her possession of the basement key hints at darker purposes - she guards or has access to whatever secrets or crimes the Sirens keep hidden below the farmhouse. Tsarrina represents the violent reality beneath the Sirens' criminal operation, the enforcer who ensures cooperation through lethal force.
author: Bethesda
